steps.title: Use the necessity signal
steps.content: The text says Steiger Butte Drum helped compose the work and must be included in every performance. That makes the ensemble essential to the piece, not merely related to it in a loose or secondary way.

steps.title: Match the word to the role
steps.content: Choice A means similar, which does not express necessity. Choice B means peripheral, the opposite of required. Choice D refers to something later in time. The word that means essential fits the sentence. The answer is C.
